rootCause: Commit 0969275 introduced a quest state overwrite in setCurrentDialogueStep (gameState.quests[questId] = { stepId }), which dropped per-quest fields like itemsClaimed whenever dialogue advanced. That reset grant-claim history and allowed grantsItems options to be claimed repeatedly.
resolution: Updated setCurrentDialogueStep to merge into existing quest state instead of replacing it, preserving itemsClaimed in IndexedDB-backed gameState. Added regression tests covering both state preservation and grant lock behavior across dialogue transitions.
